caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Save this itinerary for the best weekend in Dunedin, Florida! 😍

Dunedin is such a pretty little town and one of my favorites for a weekend getaway. There is something for everyone! 🥳

Would you visit? 🤔

#dunedinflorida #dunedinitinerary #thingstodoindunedin #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist

transcription.text: Here's how to spend the perfect weekend in the pretty little town of Dunedin, Florida. So steal this itinerary so you don't forget. Check into the Marriott Autograph Collection Fenway Hotel. This is a beautiful hotel with a nice pool and well-appointed rooms. Then grab breakfast at the Wild Iris Cafe. I loved the patio dining and their eggs benedict was outstanding. The mimosas were huge and only $7. Next drive over to Honeymoon Island State Park, rent a beach umbrella and chairs, and enjoy the blue water and excellent shelling. Just look at the soft white sand. Then rent some kayaks from Sail Honeymoon located on the Dunedin Causeway and paddle over to Kaladesi Island. This is a more secluded beach for clear blue water. Then we're going to the Dunedin Mix to have some craft cocktails on the carousel bar that makes a full rotation every 30 minutes. The drinks here were really good. Then we're going to explore downtown Dunedin. This is one of the best downtowns in Florida in my opinion and it's extremely dog-friendly. The town has even been nicknamed Dog Eden. Be sure to check out all the amazing murals. Then rent some bikes and take a ride down the Pinellas Trail. This is a popular thing to do here and the trail is lined with breweries to stop off at. For dinner, we're going to the living room, get the meatball appetizer. For after dinner drinks, we're going to Sonder Social Club for excellent craft cocktails and a very cool vibe. Send this to a friend you would want to visit here with and follow for more great Florida content from a local.
